The First Issue of GOLDENHAS Magazine is Out!

GOLDENHAS is the bimonthly digital magazine of Kadir Has University. Each issue will be published in both Turkish and English. The articles in our magazine are respectful and impartial to all religions, languages and races. GOLDENHAS consists of 7 main committees: news, sports, arts, literature, technology, student clubs and entertainment. It also includes 4 business committees: PR and social media, graphic design, translation, IT. Each issue of GOLDENHAS will be published on our website. At the same time, articles other than magazine articles will frequently meet you on our website.
